name: Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Salad oil or melted Crisco.
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder.
2. Beat the eggs and add milk. Combine with dry ingredients, mixing until smooth.
3. Add shortening or salad oil.
4. Drop by spoonfuls onto a hot griddle.
